arts.ttl: Oxford United battling Serie A duo in chase for Ajax midfielder
arts.sum: Oxford United have made an approach for Ajax midfielder Benjamin Tahirovic, according to Dutch news outlet De Telegraaf.… The post Oxford United battling Serie A duo in chase for Ajax midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: U’s boss gives strong response to rumoured interest in Tyler Goodrham
arts.sum: OXFORD United do not intend to cash in on Tyler Goodrham during the January transfer window, says head coach Gary Rowett.

arts.ttl: Exiled Stoke City striker ready to finally return to action after five months in cold
arts.sum: Stoke City exile Ryan Mmaee is finally back in full training as he bids to make his Rapid Vienna debut some five months after signing on loan. Mmaee made his senior breakthrough in Belgium with Standard Liege and played for Beveren and Aarhus, in Denmark, before moving to Cyprus then Hungary, where he was snapped up by Stoke in the summer of 2023.

arts.ttl: Oxford United, Torino and Udinese enquire about out-of-favour Ajax midfielder Benjamin Tahirović
arts.sum: According to De Telegraaf, several sides are interested in Bosnian midfielder Benjamin Tahirović. Championship club Oxford United, and Serie A sides Torino and Udinese have expressed their interest in the…

arts.ttl: Preview: Stoke City vs. Oxford United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Stoke City and Oxford United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Cork City snap up son of former Manchester United and England defender on-loan from Stoke City
arts.sum: The son of former Nottingham Forest, Arsenal, Manchester United and England defender Viv Anderson, the 18-year-old will spend the year at Turner’s Cross. Cork City have signed Stoke City teenager Freddie Anderson on loan until the end of the 2025 season.

arts.ttl: Tom Cannon £10m exit confirmed as Stoke City loan player aims for Premier League
arts.sum: Leicester City have wrapped up the transfer of Tom Cannon to Sheffield United for a sum believed to be in the region of £10m. And Cannon's move is now sealed, the Republic of Ireland striker committing to a four-and-a-half year deal with the promotion-chasing Blades at Bramall Lane.

arts.ttl: Stoke City sanction defender exit on loan
arts.sum: He had been on standby for England under-19s earlier this season - and his dad Viv Anderson is a former England international, as well as teammate of Mark Robins at Manchester United. Freddie Anderson is moving to Cork City on loan for the whole of the League of Ireland Premier Division season.

arts.ttl: Sacked Stoke City old boy lands Premier League job
arts.sum: Adam has been taken in by David Moyes for an increasingly common specialist role at Premier League clubs and he will work alongside former Stoke assistant manager Billy McKinlay, who played with Charlie's dad, Charlie Adam Sr, at Dundee United. Charlie Adam has been appointed new set piece coach at Everton.

arts.ttl: Stoke City-linked Premier League striker 'having conversations' as club weigh up transfer
arts.sum: Ipswich Town manager Kieran McKenna claims there is 'quite a lot of interest from different clubs' in Stoke City-linked striker Ali Al-Hamadi. McKenna, when asked if he would sanction an Al-Hamadi exit without first bringing in a new signing, said: "It's always a balancing act between what's the best for the club, which has to come first and foremost, but also what's best for the player.
